docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY TANG, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT QIU, LISHA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-29-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 (AMENDED TO CORRECT DEFENDANT'S ADDRESS) FILED BY TANG, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT QIU, LISHA
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE: $40.00) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TANG, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT QIU, LISHA
DECLARATION OF DEFENDANT, REGARDING FACTS OF CASE FILED BY DEFENDANT QIU, LISHA
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
TRIAL RESET TO JUL-20-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JUN-29-2018 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF AMENDING CLAIM TO CORRECT DEFENDANT'S ADDRESS FILED BY PLAINTIFF TANG, JOHN

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF JOHN TANG IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY CANTONESE COURT PROVISIONAL INTERPRETER REBECCA CHAU. DEFENDANT LISHA QIU IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY MANDARIN COURT CERTIFIED INTERPRETER AGNES CHANG #301206. JPT JEAN MILEFF DISMISSED THIS ACTION PURSUANT TO FAMILY CODE 290 AS THE ALLEGATIONS IN THIS MATTER HAS ALREADY BEEN ADJUDICATED IN FDI-13-780261. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE & REQUEST FOR RESET OF COURT DATE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF TANG, JOHN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $40.00) SERVED MAY-30-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT QIU, LISHA
